methodology: Set totals sum Pokémon TCG API catalog prices (TCGPlayer market/mid when present; Cardmarket trend when EUR is listed). One API row per numbered slot — 1st Edition, Unlimited, and Shadowless are separate in the wild but merged in the API; use print tabs + market panel for comps. Sealed rows are curated product intents with hub links (eBay sold/active, TCGPlayer, PriceCharting, Cardmarket, etc.) — not official MSRP.

sets.setValueNotes: Near-set value uses API-listed singles only. Master set in the hobby includes every print variant and parallel; that is wider than this spine sum.
